articles.title: ‘Face was disfigured in attack’: Iran's supreme leader Mojtaba Khamenei has severe and disfiguring wounds, says report
articles.description: Iran's new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei is recovering from severe facial and leg injuries caused by an airstrike that killed his father. Despite his disfigurement, he remains mentally sharp and participates in decision-making through audio conferencing.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Henry Ford: ‘Wealth, like happiness, is never attained when…’
articles.description: Henry Ford quote on wealth and useful service: meaning, business lessons, practical tips, and why purpose-led value still drives success today.

articles.title: Row erupts in Secunderabad Cantonment over midnight removal of Ambedkar statue
T.N. Assembly election: Concerned over stalled growth, Ambattur constituency residents demand GH, sewer network, wider roads
articles.description: Residents want an additional platform on the southern side of the Ambattur railway station for express and fast local trains towards Chennai to halt; they demand a government hospital as people have to go to Kilpauk Medical College Hospital or Stanley Hospital in case of emergencies

articles.title: Israel rejects ceasefire with Hezbollah ahead of Lebanon talks next week
articles.description: Talks due in Washington as Israeli attacks on Lebanon continue, Iran says ceasefire must include them.

articles.title: Israeli drone attack kills Palestinians near Gaza mosque
articles.description: An Israeli drone attack near a mosque in central Gaza has killed at least 6 people.

articles.title: Interview with Anirudhya Mitra, author of The Delhi Directive, a spy thriller
articles.description: Mitra says he uses fiction to show how complex and disciplined Indian intelligence operations really are

articles.title: Nitish Kumar expected to resign as Bihar CM on April 13
articles.description: Nitish Kumar took oath as a member of Rajya Sabha on April 10, marking an end to his two-decade stint in office and paving the way for a new Chief Minister.

topStories.title: Israel rejects ceasefire with Hezbollah ahead of Lebanon talks next week
topStories.description: Talks due in Washington as Israeli attacks on Lebanon continue, Iran says ceasefire must include them.

topStories.title: UK to shelve Chagos handover to Mauritius after Trump's ‘great stupidity’ criticism, claims report
topStories.description: The UK plans to abandon its proposal to return the Chagos Islands to Mauritius due to opposition from Trump.

topStories.title: Video: Vance arrives in Pakistan for talks with Iran
topStories.description: US Vice President JD Vance has landed in Pakistan for talks with Iranian officials on a deal to end the war on Iran.

topStories.title: Foreign secretary Vikram Misri visits Trump’s Mar-a-Lago resort, meets US envoy to India
topStories.description: US envoy to India Sergio Gor hosted Misri at Mar-a-Lago. Gor expressed the US’ intent to deepen ties with India in the coming years.

topStories.title: Iran getting a new air defense system, MANPADS? Report claims Beijing eyeing weapons shipment to Tehran
topStories.description: U.S. intelligence reports suggest China is set to deliver new air defense systems to Iran, potentially using third countries to obscure their origin.

topStories.title: Iran Has A Hormuz Problem: It Cannot Locate Mines Planted To Block Route
topStories.description: Iran had used small boats to mine Hormuz last month - soon after the US and Israel carried out joint airstrikes across Iran over stalled nuclear talks.

topStories.title: Iran's ‘Minab 168’ delegation brings blood-soaked school bags, pictures of school strike victims on flight to Pakistan
topStories.description: The Iranian delegation, led by Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, is named ‘Minab 168,’ after the school children killed in US-Israel strikes on the first day of the war.

topStories.title: From a DMK campaigner and fan of MGR to renowned littérateur
topStories.description: Kalapriya says that before joining the DMK, MGR was associated with the Congress. Over the time, he surrounded himself with seasoned political minds, including communist leaders K.  Baladhandayutham  and  Kalyanasundaram. He was further supported by experienced figures such as K.A. Krishnaswamy  and Panruti S. Ramachandran. This combination of cinematic influence and political acumen gave him an exceptional grasp of governance as well as mass psychology.

topStories.description: US and Iran begin high-level talks in Islamabad. Here's when and where they are taking place, who is attending and what is at stake.

topStories.description: The temporary ceasefire came as US-led talks on ending the four-year-old conflict have been derailed by the Middle East war. The two sides also held a ceasefire for the Orthodox Easter last year.

topStories.title: Concerns after satellite provider restricts Iran images following US pressure
topStories.description: Planet Labs says it is restricting coverage of Iran and parts of the Middle East indefinitely.
